holdings.infoBox: IWX is an equity ETF with a total of 159 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 5.16%, Berkshire Hathaway at 3.88%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 3.68%, Alphabet at 3.24%, and Amazon.com at 2.75%.

overview.description: The iShares Russell Top 200 Value ETF (IWX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell Top 200 Value index. The fund tracks an index of large-cap stocks selected from 200 of the largest US value companies. IWX was launched on Sep 22, 2009 and is issued by BlackRock.
